description_long: This object is a three-branched candelabrum with a metallic, silver-gray frame and three thick, orange-yellow candles set atop each arm. The central stem is sturdy and geometric, splitting into three arms that each hold a candle in a hexagonal holder. The base is tripod-like, providing stability with three angled legs that extend outward. The candles are short and chunky, with slightly uneven tops, suggesting they have been partially used. The metal frame has a matte finish, with subtle ridges and facets that catch the light. The overall design is modern yet functional, suitable for both decorative and practical lighting in an urban environment.
description: A silver-gray, three-branched candelabrum with three orange-yellow candles and a sturdy tripod base. The design is modern and decorative, with chunky candles and a matte metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three candles and the symmetrical branching of the candelabrum.
description_view_1: Side view with two candles aligned, revealing the depth and thickness of the central stem and base.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying all three candles and the geometric structure of the arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two candles aligned, highlighting the profile of the holder and the tripod base.
